name: askbrows
description: askbrows monorepo — единая dev-команда для фронта и бэка.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n "DB,BACK,FRONT" -c "#38bdf8,green,#a855f7" "docker compose up postgres" "python -m uv run --directory backend uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000" "pnpm --dir frontend dev"
scripts.dev:back: python -m uv run --directory backend uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.db:init: python -m uv run --directory backend alembic upgrade head && python -m uv run --directory backend python -m app.scripts.seed
scripts.install:all: pnpm install && pnpm --dir frontend install && python -m uv sync --directory backend
